Fast Folders
FeaturesVideoPricingReviewsFAQPrivacy Policy

Organize Your Chats
Like Never Before

Quickly create, organize and access chat folders for Google Gemini.
Fast Folders: The Ultimate Google Gemini Chat Organizer! Available now on Chrome and Microsoft Edge.

Add to ChromeAdd to Edge

Why Choose Fast Folders?

Drag and Drop

Easily drag and drop chats into folders for quick organization.

Smart Search

Find any folder or chat in seconds with our powerful search capabilities.

Easy Backups

Quick and easy import/export feature for backing up folder structures.

Add folders, nested folders and chats

Quickly create folders, nested folders and add chats to them.

Change folder color

Assign any color to a folder for quicker locating.

Prompts Manager

Manage your prompts with ease. Create, edit, and delete prompts as needed.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

All payments are made through Lemon Squeezy!

Basic

Free
10 Fast Folders
  • Create 10 Fast Folders
  • Create nested folders up to 4 levels
  • Add up to 10 chats in each folder
  • Download chats to pdf
  • Prompts Manager Access
  • Change folder colors
  • Search folders and chats
  • Email support
  • Consistent updates

  • Access to all features
  • Unlimited Fast Folders
  • Create nested folders up to 4 levels
  • Download chats to pdf
  • Fast Folder Cloud
  • Sync across multiple devices

Try it now

Fast Folders is a must-have for Google Gemini users! 🗂 Quickly organize chats, access them easily, and save time. Highly recommended!

לירן בלומנברג

Verified review Chrome Webstore

Great organizational tool, recommend to all!

Alexander Gerber

Verified review Chrome Webstore

Ahhhhhh finally ! exactly what I was looking for. For now it's perfect for my needs. Thanks !However, it would be great to be able to move a discussion from a folder to another. I hope the author will continue developping it.

Nicolas Caplat

Verified review Chrome Webstore

Great idea, this is something missing in Gemini, and this extension allows you to do it flawlessly.

Luis Li

Verified review Chrome Webstore

First of all, thank you very much for creating Fast Folders! I find it incredibly helpful for organizing my Google Gemini chats and really appreciate the functionality you've provided, I think Fast Folders is fantastic.

Fabian Pfeiffer

Verified review Chrome Webstore

Excellent layout and design. I use another Chrome extension for creating folders for ChatGPT, but this Gemini folder creator is much more beautiful, and it has the additional functionality of creating subfolders and giving folders colors. This app's designer has a keen eye for detail.

Jude Zambarakji

Verified review Chrome Webstore

Works very well - I had a small issue when I changed machine and the licence was stuck on the older machine - sent them a quick email with my original purchase details - and had a reply with the solution within a couple of hours - fair play considering it was the weekend - great service and great little extension.

Dermot Mulholland

Verified review Chrome Webstore

The prompt manager is underrated. I store my best prompts and reuse them instead of rewriting from scratch every time.

Andy Bent

Verified review Chrome Webstore

This extension genuinely made me more productive. Before, I'd waste time scrolling through Gemini chats, but now I just jump into the exact folder I need. Huge time saver

Benjamin Hutch

Verified review Chrome Webstore

The one true feature that stopped me from migrating from ChatGPT to Gemini was the lack of ergonomics. this addon solved all my problems. Its intuitive and esthetically non-intrusive. If only I had this for the phone app...

Leonard Luca

Verified review Chrome Webstore

Fast Folders is a must-have for Google Gemini users! 🗂 Quickly organize chats, access them easily, and save time. Highly recommended!
